programmes.show_description: Get your fix of all the best new releases in one handy playlist.
Matt Everitt previews the week's best brand new albums, as we hear from Joshua Idehen, Cobrah and Bonnie 'Prince' Billy.
6 Music takes you through the early hours, playing back-to-back music.
6 Music goes back to the 90s!
6 Music goes back to the 00s!
Chris celebrates International Women's Day with 30 minutes of remixed tracks from incredible women in music.
New music and the biggest Friday bangers with Chris Hawkins.
Rapper Denzel Curry chats to Nick about his new album and touring with Deftones.
Musician and spoken word performer Joshua Idehen joins around his debut album, I Know You're Hurting, Everyone is Hurting, Everyone is Trying, You Have Got to Try.
Craig spins some joyous tunes to get your weekend started, before giving YOU the chance to pick the last song of the show!
It's Friday, so Huw is out to prove that any song sounds better when it's played on 6 Music by Huw Stephens - so let us know what you want to hear.

programmes.show_name: The People's Party with Femi Koleoso
programmes.show_description: Femi's love letter to all Ghanaians around the world as the country celebrates 69 years of freedom. Highlighting their breadth of genres, with a Friday Vibe from Ghana's M.anifest.
Indie bangers from Yeah Yeah Yeahs, Cold War Kids, and Dry Cleaning pop by!
Ladytron takeover the Indie Forever playlist playing their favourite female-fronted indie!

programmes.show_name: The 6 Mix with Mary Anne Hobbs
programmes.show_description: Berlin via London DJ MI-EL takes over the 6 Mix.
The story of 90s rave and beyond through the voices of 3 iconic female DJs and producers.
6 Music takes you to the dark side with a playlist featuring the finest goth, electronic and dark pop music, with tracks from Fields of the Nephilim, MIA, UNKLE and Ethel Cain.

programmes.show_name: Indie Forever Disco with Beth Ditto
programmes.show_description: Bringing the club vibes to you - wherever you are, whenever you want. Upbeat music to transport you to the dance floor from Everything Everything, Glass Candy and Hot Chip.
A two-hour mix of ambient music curated by Dr Alex Paterson, aka The Orb, to help you focus your mind and get into the zone. Featuring music by Brian Eno, Teebs and Oval.
Ease into your Saturday with AFRODEUTSCHE. The ultimate soft-launch for your weekend - 2 hours of fluid, deep-listening tracks designed to ground you before the day truly begins.
Mark and Stuart present a feast of great music and comedian Sam Campbell shares his 'First, Last and Everything' and chats about the new series of 'Last One Laughing.'.
Deb Grant sets the weekend vibe with a magical melting pot of amazing music, seamlessly crossing genres, from hip-hop to soul to electronica to rock to dub and more.
Jamz gets your weekend party started with an uplifting array of alternative RnB, broken beat, global club sounds and leftfield electronica.
Joining the musical dots, soul, hip-hop, house, Afro, Latin, electronica, jazz and beyond.

programmes.show_name: The Craig Charles Funk and Soul Show
programmes.show_description: The best in funk and soul with Craig Charles.
Don's Saturday night selections cross time, space and genre. This week, his record box contains Black Samurai, James Blake, Suzanne Vega, Fauna and Skip Marley amongst others.
SHERELLE's got a bag of summery UK garage, bruk and more as she manifests warmer nights!
